tasks.description: Draw data-driven conclusions on strengths and weaknesses. Select weak holdings for removal and strong positions for retention or adjustment.

subtasks.description: Synthesize findings to mark tickers for removal, retention, or allocation changes based on evidence. No tool call required.

tasks.description: Screen for new, higher quality tickers (including stocks and ETFs) to replace defined weaknesses and diversify.

subtasks.description: Run stock_screener with concise constraints to find stocks with low beta, high ROE, strong risk-adjusted returns, and sector diversification.
Run stock_screener with constraints to find complementary ETFs with appealing risk metrics and low correlations.
Run stock_screener anew with an alternative set of constraints based on gaps identified in 3a and 4a.

tasks.description: Construct and document the new/optimized portfolio and add to episodic memory.

subtasks.description: Define the new portfolio_dict based on analysis and screening results. No tool call required.
Log the full new/optimized portfolio, allocations, and rationale to episodic_remember.

tasks.description: Run comprehensive analytics and iterative optimization on the new portfolio.

subtasks.description: Use calculate_portfolio_performance, calculate_portfolio_correlation_matrix, and calculate_portfolio_beta_vs_index to assess improvements.
Make incremental adjustments and rerun analytics until risk/return and user preferences are satisfied. No tool call required.

tasks.description: Finalize, format, and output the new/optimized portfolio including all mandated JSON output details.

subtasks.description: Format the portfolio and all changes in strict JSON, with thesis and rationale per ticker, following user output instructions. No tool call required.
